name: HeroSection
description: Full hero section with heading, subheading, CTA, and optional visual. Supports centered and split layouts.

visual.description: Visual element (image, video, illustration, or animation component)

align.description: Layout alignment. 'center' stacks vertically; 'left' creates a split layout with visual on the right.

className.description: Additional Tailwind classes for the outer section

slots.name: heading
slots.description: Primary heading content (h1, styled text, etc.)

slots.name: subheading
slots.description: Supporting text or paragraph below the heading

slots.name: visual
slots.description: Image, video, illustration, or animation component

layout.description: Full-width section. Center or split layout based on align prop. Centered uses flex-col; left uses 2-column grid on desktop.

aiPromptHint: Use HeroSection as the top section of a landing page. Pass heading, subheading, and CTA as ReactNode slots. Set align='left' for a split layout with visual on the right. Pair with background components (GradientMesh, Aurora, DotGrid) behind it.
